examples:
<sqf>
_item = "HandGrenade";
_fits = player canAddItemToUniform _item;
if (_fits) then
{
	player addItemToUniform _item;
}
else
{
	hint "no room!";
};
</sqf>
name: canAddItemToUniform

Item.desc: (Optional, default [[false]]) [[true]] to ignore 'soldierMaxLoad' param, container [[maxLoad]] is still counted.
Item.name: ignoreSoldierMaxLoad
